scripts.check: node --check functions/api/orders.js && node --check functions/api/orders/status.js && node --check functions/api/orders/project/init.js && node --check functions/api/order-steps.js && node --check functions/api/order-steps/update.js && node --check functions/api/calculators.js && node --check functions/api/calculators/[id].js && node --check functions/api/calculators/[id]/publish.js && node --check functions/api/calculators/[id]/embed.js && node --check functions/api/calculators/[id]/lead.js && node --check src/orders-core.js && node --check src/order-statuses.js && node --check src/project-templates.js && node --check src/calculators-core.js && node --check src/phone.js
scripts.dev: wrangler pages dev public --d1 DB --binding RUNTIME_SCHEMA_INIT=true --binding ADMIN_TOKEN=dev-admin-token --compatibility-date=2026-05-29 --persist-to=.wrangler/state
